raw_response:
I concur with agent1’s assessment that quantifying serum β-hCG provides earlier confirmation relative to imaging-based approaches. Biochemical assays offer advantages in both speed and accuracy regarding initial screening stages, especially prior to anatomical visibility achieved through ultrasound technologies. Thus, selecting option C aligns well with current standards emphasizing timely prenatal care initiation based upon hormonal indicators rather than relying solely on physical examination findings until adequate embryonic growth occurs.  

Therefore, my chosen response remains consistent with existing conclusions highlighting the superiority of hCG measurement over alternative methodologies concerning promptness and reliability within early pregnancy detection protocols.
